title: Parkside Commons Held Again, Dr. Linda LeMura Honorary Sign, BESS Moratorium Introduced
summary: Jimmy Monto presents items 40-45. Items 40 (Parkside Commons tax exemption) and 41 held for further discussion. Item 42: honorary street sign for Dr. Linda LeMura at Salt Springs/Springfield Road near LeMoyne College; name typo corrected late the prior night. All councilors join. Items 43-45 handed to Jake Dishaw (deputy commissioner, code enforcement and zoning).
raw_content:
[01:00:10] items 40 through 45. Uh, we will hold 40
[01:00:14] for further discussion. Uh, 41 will also
[01:00:17] be held for another meeting.
[01:00:20] 42 is the installation of an honorary
[01:00:23] street sign for Dr. Linda Lamira. I
[01:00:24] would invite my other counselors to join
[01:00:26] in with me if you'd like to.
[01:00:28] >> I will. I will.
[01:00:29] >> Me, too.
[01:00:30] >> I will. There's um there's a typo on her
[01:00:32] name is Linda. No, Linda.
[01:00:34] >> We fixed that.
[01:00:34] >> We fixed that.
[01:00:35] >> We fixed that at 11:00 last night.
[01:00:37] [laughter]
[01:00:39] >> Um and then 43 through 45. Jake,
[01:00:52] >> good afternoon, council. Jake Dishaw,
[01:00:54] deputy commissioner of code enforcement
processing_notes: Dr. Linda LeMura is associated with LeMoyne College
Parkside Commons continues to be held across multiple study sessions
Segment 17 of 19 from Common Council Study Session, Wednesday February 18th 2026
Transcript corrections applied: national grid -> National Grid
